title: INet
body:
I can't bear it anymore. How can I live without localization😭

To solve this problem, install this Mod, which replaces all modifiable text with localizable text using Mixin. Just provide the corresponding language's lang file. When dealing with hardcoding, only hard measures can be used!
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/c32wEFej/images/283ecc298aa5cec1a78acf4d76520b1659ffa8af.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/c32wEFej/images/62abadb7215c23c6a8abad71c39c7c1a1011a061.png)
[![Fork me on Gitee](https://gitee.com/anecansaitin/INet/widgets/widget_6.svg)](https://gitee.com/anecansaitin/INet)
